body:
## Context
Admin-only operations: assigning event split costs to families and recording any payment as received (cash, check, Zelle).

## What to do

### Add to `src/actions/admin-payments.ts`

**`assignEventCosts(prevState, formData)`**
- Validate: event_id, array of { family_id, amount }
- Auth check — admin only
- Creates `event_charges` rows for each family
- `revalidatePath('/admin')`

**`recordPaymentReceived(prevState, formData)`**
- Validate: family_id, type (membership/share/event/donation), amount, method (cash/check/zelle), note (optional)
- Auth check — admin only
- Creates a `payments` row with `recorded_by` set to current admin
- If type is 'event', updates the matching `event_charges.paid` to true
- If type is 'share', updates matching `shares.paid` to true
- If type is 'membership', updates `families.membership_expires_at`
- `revalidatePath('/admin')`

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Admin can assign split costs to multiple families for an event
- [ ] Admin can record payment for any type
- [ ] Related records (event_charges, shares, membership expiry) are updated
- [ ] Members cannot access these actions

## Dependencies
- #148 (payments table)
- #149 (event_charges table)
- #150 (validators)
title: Server actions: admin event charges and payment recording
